headers.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS
headers.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, Accept, X-Requested-With, Origin, x-institute-id, x-api-key, X-API-Key, Access-Control-Allow-Headers, Access-Control-Request-Method, Access-Control-Request-Headers, Cache-Control, Pragma, If-Modified-Since
